_comment: HUMAN-OWNED. Short annotations shown under individual works in the full bibliography. The ORCID sync never reads or writes this file, so notes survive every regeneration of generated/publications.json. Key on `doi` (preferred) or `bibcode`.
_howToUse: Add an entry only where context genuinely helps a reader — an unexpected field,
an undergraduate paper, a dataset release. Most works need no note at all.
Notes are merged in at build time by src/data/allPublications.ts.

notes.note: Surface-science work from my 2007 NSF REU at UC Davis, before I moved into astrophysics.
